name: embedding
description: Create embedding vectors or search a collection by similarity

query.description: JSON array embedding vector to search with (required for search)

collection.description: Path to a JSON collection file (required for search)

model.description: Model name for embedding (optional, create only)

top_k.description: Number of top results to return (optional, search only, default 5)

operation.description: Operation to perform: create or search
